blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
